target.title: feat: add tart provider for macOS VMs on Apple Silicon
target.body:
﻿## Summary

Add a `tart` provider for running macOS VMs on Apple Silicon via [Cirrus Labs tart](https://github.com/cirruslabs/tart). This enables local macOS staging environments using Apple's native Virtualization.framework -- no Parallels license needed.

## What to review

The real implementation diff is **~1,100 lines across 4 files** -- the rest is tests and docs.

| Area | Files | Lines | What it does |
|------|-------|-------|-------------|
| **Provider** (review this) | `backend.go`, `core.go`, `flags.go`, `provider.go` | ~1,112 | Full VM lifecycle: clone, configure, start, IP discovery, SSH key injection, release, cleanup, doctor |
| **Shared plumbing** | `config.go`, `config_cmd.go`, `status.go`, `static.go`, `provider_backend.go`, `all.go` | ~388 | Tart config struct, YAML/env/CLI wiring, provider registration, config show |
| **Tests** (skim) | `provider_test.go` | ~3,969 | 245 unit tests, 4 rounds of mutation testing (64.2% kill rate) |
| **Docs** | `tart.md`, `source-map.md`, `README.md` | ~67 | Provider reference page, source map entry |

## How it works

- **Acquire**: `tart clone` from OCI base image, `tart set` CPU/memory (disk only when explicit), `tart run --no-graphics`, poll `tart ip`, inject SSH key via `tart exec`, wait for SSH readiness
- **Resolve**: find running VM by `crabbox-` name prefix; stopped VMs rejected for SSH-target commands, reported for status
- **List**: `tart list --source local --format json` filtered by prefix
- **Release**: `tart stop` (best-effort) + `tart delete` (propagates real failures to prevent state loss); lease claim and SSH key only removed on successful deletion
- **Cleanup**: garbage collect stale crabbox-owned VMs past idle timeout (including malformed claims)
- **Doctor**: verify tart CLI and list capability; counts only `crabbox-` VMs
- **SSH key injection**: via `tart exec` with POSIX user validation and public key escaping (no sshpass, no credentials on argv)
- **Ready check**: macOS-safe `uname -s && test -d ~` (no crabbox-ready script needed)
- **Kept lease persistence**: `tart run` is detached via `Process.Release()` for `--keep` leases so the VM survives crabbox exit; keep=true VMs are preserved on post-start failure

## Final-head host smoke (8a108d7, M4 Pro, Tart 2.32.1)

Built from `feat/local-tart-provider` head on Apple Silicon (M4 Pro, macOS, Go 1.26.4).

### doctor
```
ok      git      /usr/bin/git
ok      ssh      /usr/bin/ssh
ok      ssh-keygen /usr/bin/ssh-keygen
ok      rsync    /usr/bin/rsync
ok      ssh-key  per-lease
ok      provider provider=tart timeout=10s cli=ready control_plane=local inventory=ready api=list mutation=false leases=1 runtime=2.32.1 image=ghcr.io/cirruslabs/macos-sequoia-base:latest ssh_probe=unchecked
```

### list (existing keep=true VM)
```
crabbox-harbor-krill-f04ccdde crabbox-harbor-krill-f04ccdde ready        ghcr.io_cirruslabs_macos-sequoia-base_latest                 lease=cbx_6f6ac75c99e5 slug=harbor-krill keep=true target=macos
```

### go test (246 tests, provider + CLI)
```
ok      github.com/openclaw/crabbox/internal/providers/tart    3.375s
ok      github.com/openclaw/crabbox/internal/cli               35.739s
```

### mutation testing (gomu, 4 rounds)
```
Killed: 591/968 (64.2%)
Survived: 327 (182 conditional_binary equivalent mutants, 16 return_zero_value no-ops, remainder in Acquire/startVM external-dependency paths)
```

All exit codes 0.

## Fixes addressed

1. **applyDefaults SSHUser override** (2f84767): inherit explicit `ssh.user` before defaulting to `admin`
2. **keep=true VM destruction** (2f84767): preserve VMs on post-start waitForIP/injectSSHKey failure
3. **startVM ctx.Done()** (2f84767): check context before launching keep=true VM, cancel-aware select
4. **Running field JSON omission** (2f84767): check `instanceRunning(State)` alongside `Running` bool
5. **--tart-disk 0** (2f84767): accept 0 as "use clone default" per flag help text
6. **Stale claim pruning** (2f84767): resolveInstance returns claim data for missing VMs
7. **ReleaseLease state loss** (013a64a): propagate real deleteVM failures before removing lease claim/key; stop errors still tolerated (VM may already be stopped)
8. **Kept VM post-start cleanup** (59d3d24): guard prepareLease, claim persistence, and endpoint update cleanup with `!req.Keep` so kept VMs survive post-start failures (matches Multipass pattern)
9. **Empty-IP running VM** (8a108d7): use `instanceRunning(State)` not the JSON `Running` bool in prepareLease empty-IP check, so `State=running` with omitted `Running` correctly errors instead of returning a no-SSH LeaseTarget
10. **Keep=true process detach** (8a108d7): call `Process.Release()` after startup observe window for kept VMs so the tart process is genuinely detached from crabbox lifecycle

## Configuration

CLI flags: `--tart-image`, `--tart-cpu`, `--tart-memory`, `--tart-disk`

YAML (`.crabbox.yaml`):
```yaml
tart:
  image: ghcr.io/cirruslabs/macos-ventura-base:latest
  user: admin
  cpus: 4
  memory: 8192
  # disk: 80  # only set to resize beyond the base image default
```

Env vars: `CRABBOX_TART_IMAGE`, `CRABBOX_TART_USER`, `CRABBOX_TART_WORK_ROOT`, `CRABBOX_TART_CPUS`, `CRABBOX_TART_MEMORY`, `CRABBOX_TART_DISK`

## Not included (follow-up)

- Desktop/VNC (tart VMs run headless; Screen Sharing setup is a follow-up)
- Shared-directory mounts (`tart run --dir`; needs explicit host-mount config)
- Checkpoint/fork (tracked as a separate follow-up PR)

target.title: feat: add tart provider for macOS VMs on Apple Silicon
target.body:
﻿## Summary

Add a `tart` provider for running macOS VMs on Apple Silicon via [Cirrus Labs tart](https://github.com/cirruslabs/tart). This enables local macOS staging environments using Apple's native Virtualization.framework -- no Parallels license needed.

## What to review

The real implementation diff is **~1,100 lines across 4 files** -- the rest is tests and docs.

| Area | Files | Lines | What it does |
|------|-------|-------|-------------|
| **Provider** (review this) | `backend.go`, `core.go`, `flags.go`, `provider.go` | ~1,112 | Full VM lifecycle: clone, configure, start, IP discovery, SSH key injection, release, cleanup, doctor |
| **Shared plumbing** | `config.go`, `config_cmd.go`, `status.go`, `static.go`, `provider_backend.go`, `all.go` | ~388 | Tart config struct, YAML/env/CLI wiring, provider registration, config show |
| **Tests** (skim) | `provider_test.go` | ~3,969 | 245 unit tests, 4 rounds of mutation testing (64.2% kill rate) |
| **Docs** | `tart.md`, `source-map.md`, `README.md` | ~67 | Provider reference page, source map entry |

## How it works

- **Acquire**: `tart clone` from OCI base image, `tart set` CPU/memory (disk only when explicit), `tart run --no-graphics`, poll `tart ip`, inject SSH key via `tart exec`, wait for SSH readiness
- **Resolve**: find running VM by `crabbox-` name prefix; stopped VMs rejected for SSH-target commands, reported for status
- **List**: `tart list --source local --format json` filtered by prefix
- **Release**: `tart stop` (best-effort) + `tart delete` (propagates real failures to prevent state loss); lease claim and SSH key only removed on successful deletion
- **Cleanup**: garbage collect stale crabbox-owned VMs past idle timeout (including malformed claims)
- **Doctor**: verify tart CLI and list capability; counts only `crabbox-` VMs
- **SSH key injection**: via `tart exec` with POSIX user validation and public key escaping (no sshpass, no credentials on argv)
- **Ready check**: macOS-safe `uname -s && test -d ~` (no crabbox-ready script needed)
- **Kept lease persistence**: `tart run` is detached via `Process.Release()` for `--keep` leases so the VM survives crabbox exit; keep=true VMs are preserved on post-start failure

## Final-head host smoke (8a108d7, M4 Pro, Tart 2.32.1)

Built from `feat/local-tart-provider` head on Apple Silicon (M4 Pro, macOS, Go 1.26.4).

### doctor
```
ok      git      /usr/bin/git
ok      ssh      /usr/bin/ssh
ok      ssh-keygen /usr/bin/ssh-keygen
ok      rsync    /usr/bin/rsync
ok      ssh-key  per-lease
ok      provider provider=tart timeout=10s cli=ready control_plane=local inventory=ready api=list mutation=false leases=1 runtime=2.32.1 image=ghcr.io/cirruslabs/macos-sequoia-base:latest ssh_probe=unchecked
```

### list (existing keep=true VM)
```
crabbox-harbor-krill-f04ccdde crabbox-harbor-krill-f04ccdde ready        ghcr.io_cirruslabs_macos-sequoia-base_latest                 lease=cbx_6f6ac75c99e5 slug=harbor-krill keep=true target=macos
```

### go test (246 tests, provider + CLI)
```
ok      github.com/openclaw/crabbox/internal/providers/tart    3.375s
ok      github.com/openclaw/crabbox/internal/cli               35.739s
```

### mutation testing (gomu, 4 rounds)
```
Killed: 591/968 (64.2%)
Survived: 327 (182 conditional_binary equivalent mutants, 16 return_zero_value no-ops, remainder in Acquire/startVM external-dependency paths)
```

All exit codes 0.

## Fixes addressed

1. **applyDefaults SSHUser override** (2f84767): inherit explicit `ssh.user` before defaulting to `admin`
2. **keep=true VM destruction** (2f84767): preserve VMs on post-start waitForIP/injectSSHKey failure
3. **startVM ctx.Done()** (2f84767): check context before launching keep=true VM, cancel-aware select
4. **Running field JSON omission** (2f84767): check `instanceRunning(State)` alongside `Running` bool
5. **--tart-disk 0** (2f84767): accept 0 as "use clone default" per flag help text
6. **Stale claim pruning** (2f84767): resolveInstance returns claim data for missing VMs
7. **ReleaseLease state loss** (013a64a): propagate real deleteVM failures before removing lease claim/key; stop errors still tolerated (VM may already be stopped)
8. **Kept VM post-start cleanup** (59d3d24): guard prepareLease, claim persistence, and endpoint update cleanup with `!req.Keep` so kept VMs survive post-start failures (matches Multipass pattern)
9. **Empty-IP running VM** (8a108d7): use `instanceRunning(State)` not the JSON `Running` bool in prepareLease empty-IP check, so `State=running` with omitted `Running` correctly errors instead of returning a no-SSH LeaseTarget
10. **Keep=true process detach** (8a108d7): call `Process.Release()` after startup observe window for kept VMs so the tart process is genuinely detached from crabbox lifecycle

## Configuration

CLI flags: `--tart-image`, `--tart-cpu`, `--tart-memory`, `--tart-disk`

YAML (`.crabbox.yaml`):
```yaml
tart:
  image: ghcr.io/cirruslabs/macos-ventura-base:latest
  user: admin
  cpus: 4
  memory: 8192
  # disk: 80  # only set to resize beyond the base image default
```

Env vars: `CRABBOX_TART_IMAGE`, `CRABBOX_TART_USER`, `CRABBOX_TART_WORK_ROOT`, `CRABBOX_TART_CPUS`, `CRABBOX_TART_MEMORY`, `CRABBOX_TART_DISK`

## Not included (follow-up)

- Desktop/VNC (tart VMs run headless; Screen Sharing setup is a follow-up)
- Shared-directory mounts (`tart run --dir`; needs explicit host-mount config)
- Checkpoint/fork (tracked as a separate follow-up PR)
